title: Voice Test — Five Female First-Officer Voices
description: Auditioning the future narrator voice. Five Gemini voices, back to back, each reading the same first-officer briefing line, in this order: Kore, Sulafat, Vindemiatrix, Gacrux, then Erinome. Tell Claude which one you'd like as the show voice (or ask for a bespoke/cloned voice instead).
